data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifying choices to enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Minimal design with quick-navigation menus and autocomplete.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designing interface elements for easy interaction.
data.technical_spec: Large, clickable buttons on commonly used functions.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: People are more tolerant of usability issues when designs are aesthetically pleasing.
data.technical_spec: Clean interfaces, ample whitespace, and visual harmony.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites and prefer your site to work the same way as other sites they already know.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design elements and familiar navigation patterns.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Group related items together to establish relationships.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of related search results and ads.
